prompt.text:
帮我在 NocoBase 复刻这个原型:审批工作流系统。参考原型(OSS 模板):https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/65-approval-workflow-system.html

[环境] NocoBase env `flash14231`(nb CLI 已配)。所有写操作一律 `nb api <...> -e flash14231 -y`(始终显式 -e,带 -y)。
**先把 `nocobase-prototype-repro` skill 读完(SKILL.md + references/ 全部:spec-template / block-recipes / gotchas / visual-loop)再动手。**
原型 HTML 末尾内嵌 `<script type="application/nb-spec+json">` 权威规格(集合/字段/枚举/页面/招牌区块)——先 curl 抓原型读这个 spec,它是唯一事实源,严格照建。集合前缀统一用 `app65_`(本实例里多个原型共存,前缀务必隔离)。
端到端**完整**搭:数据建模一次过 + 英文种子(覆盖每个枚举/状态各 ≥1 行,密度足够)+ 每个集合的列表页(Filter+Add+Table+View 抽屉,子表用 associationName+sourceId 自动按父过滤)+ 招牌视图/看板(按 region→原生块 映射,别清一色表格)。
[视觉自查] Playwright 全新无缓存浏览器打开 `/admin/<pageUid>`;token 按 skill 的 visual-loop 注入 localStorage NOCOBASE_TOKEN(env `flash14231` 的 token 可从 nb 配置/登录取;appslib 可 UI 登录 admin@nocobase.com / ***REDACTED***)。截图 ↔ 原型对照,对齐 **≥8 成**才算完成;招牌区块为空/报错绝不算完成。框住招牌主体,别出现大片白屏。
全程自主多轮推进,不要停下来问我。
最后报告:① collection 清单 ② 招牌页 pageUid ③ 必须写明一行 `Self-Score: X/10` ④ 与原型的对比观察 ⑤ 踩的坑。
prompt.launchInstruction: First read the nocobase-prototype-repro skill (SKILL.md + references/). Then read ~/prj/vscodes/app-library-bench/tooling/bench/prompts/round-61-90/p65.prompt.txt as the user requirement and reproduce it END-TO-END in the NocoBase env 'flash14231' via the nb CLI (ALWAYS pass -e flash14231): SPEC -> data modeling in ONE pass -> all-English seed (every enum) -> list pages (Filter+Add+Table+View drawer+sub-tables) -> refine signature regions -> screenshot self-check >=80%. Autonomous, no questions. End with a FINAL REPORT: collections, signature pageUid(s), Self-Score, comparison notes, gaps.

outcome.finalText:
The reproduction is complete and verified end-to-end. Here is the final report.

---

# FINAL REPORT — OSS Template #65 "审批工作流系统 / Approval Workflow System" → NocoBase `flash14231`

## ① Collections (prefix `app65_`, all created in one modeling pass)
| Collection | Title | Key fields | Relations |
|---|---|---|---|
| **app65_requests** | Approval Requests | req_code, title, type(7-enum), requester, dept, amount, currency, submitted, age_hours, urgent/watching/my_stage(bool), risk(low/med/high), ai_score, ai_class, sla, status(pending/review/escalated/approved/rejected), reason, suggestion | `steps` o2m, `extracts` o2m |
| **app65_steps** | Approval Steps | seq, role, who, state(auto/done/current/pending/rejected), note, step_time | `request` m2o (fk requestId) |
| **app65_extracts** | AI Extractions | label, value, confidence(hi/md) | `request` m2o (fk requestId) |
| **app65_feed** | AI Triage Feed | feed_color(violet/green/amber/blue), message, time_ago, req_ref | — |

**Seed (all-English, every enum ≥1 row):** 9 requests covering all 7 types + all 5 statuses (incl. added `approved`/`rejected` rows), 34 steps (all 5 states), 36 extractions (hi+md), 7 feed items (all 4 colors). Steps/extracts seeded as nested associations so the m2o populated correctly (camelCase-FK gotcha avoided).

## ② Pages
- **Master list pages** (Filter + Add + Table + View drawer): Approval Requests `yka3fuylufp` (drawer = Details + **steps & extracts sub-tables auto-filtered via associationName+sourceId**), AI Triage Feed `och6qi632n5`, Approval Steps `s9azi81ivkk`, AI Extractions `4i19ykqs3lu`.
- **★ Signature page "My Approvals"** — **pageSchemaUid `8yunkcl61pw`** (`/admin/8yunkcl61pw`).

Region→block map (anti-monotone): KPI strip → **jsBlock**; queue → **List + JSField card** (icon tile, meta line, RISK/AI pills, per-row mini-stepper fetched from steps, status pill, urgent red border) + **JSItemAction pill bar** (tabs + type chips, wired to `addFilterGroup`) + card click → **native drawe

Autonomous, no questions. End with a FINAL REPORT: collections, signature pageUid(s), Self-Score, comparison notes, gaps.
I'll start by loading the prototype-repro skill and reading the prompt requirement.

transcript.cmd: {"skill": "nocobase-prototype-repro"}

transcript.text:
Base directory for this skill: ~/.claude/skills/nocobase-prototype-repro

# Goal

Turn a prototype + a one-line ask into a faithful NocoBase app. This is a **meta / orchestration skill** — it sequences `nocobase-data-modeling` + `nocobase-ui-builder` + `nocobase-app-discipline` and adds the two things that decide fidelity: a **region → native-block mapping** and a **visual convergence loop**. It does not re-teach the CLI; it routes to the sibling skills for mechanics and owns only the reproduction-specific judgment.

# When to use / Non-Goals

**Hard gate (check before selecting this skill):** there must be an actual prototype in hand — an HTML file, a screenshot, or a link to one — that you are matching against. No prototype, no fidelity gap → this is **not** the skill; a plain "build me an app / a page" request belongs to `nocobase-app-discipline` (whole system) or `nocobase-ui-builder` (single page/edit). Do not let this skill shadow the normal build flow.

**Use when:**
- The user gives a prototype (HTML file, link, screenshot, or a `public/prototypes/...` URL to curl) and wants it reproduced in NocoBase.
- A page already exists but the user says it's monotone / ugly / doesn't match the prototype / a region should be a list/card/kanban instead of a table — i.e. there is a **visual target and a fidelity gap**.

**Non-Goals — hand off, do not do here:**
- Pure data modeling (collections/fields/relations with no visual target) → `nocobase-data-modeling`.
- Workflows / automations → `nocobase-workflow-manage`. ACL / permissions → `nocobase-acl-manage`. Plugin work → `nocobase-plugin-development`.
- A localized UI edit with **no visual target and no fidelity gap** (move one field, rename an action, tweak a reaction) → `nocobase-ui-builder` **directly**. This skill is only worth its overhead when you are matching a prototype's look/behavior; for a mechanical surface edit, skip straight to ui-builder.
- Whole-page authoring from a business sentence with **no** prototype → author a quick prototype first ([prototype-authoring.md](references/prototype-authoring.md)), then this skill; or if the user just wants a generic page, that's `nocobase-ui-builder`'s `applyBlueprint`.

# Router — task shape → read first

Hit one route, read its "first" doc, and only open the "then" docs when that route is still not enough. Sibling skills own the mechanics; the reference files here own the reproduction-specific judgment.

| Task shape | Read first | Then, as needed |
|---|---|---|
| Prototype handed over → reproduce end-to-end | [spec-template.md](references/spec-template.md) (Phase 1 SPEC) | [decomposition-grammar.md](references/decomposition-grammar.md), [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md), [gotchas.md](references/gotchas.md), [visual-loop.md](references/visual-loop.md) |
| Existing page is monotone / ugly / off | [visual-loop.md](references/visual-loop.md) | [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md), [gotchas.md](references/gotchas.md) |
| "Which block for this region?" | the **Region → native block** table below | [decomposition-grammar.md](references/decomposition-grammar.md), [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md) |
| Need a **JS body** for a widget (KPI card, donut, leaderboard, due-soon alert, progress bar, trend, facet filter, card grid, …) | [template-library/_index.md](references/template-library/_index.md) — 57 copy-pastable widget bodies, each with its `$p` input contract | [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md) |
| Build/edit JS, flow-surfaces, popup, chart **mechanics** + runnable CLI | `nocobase-ui-builder` (its `js.md` / `popup.md` / `chart.md` / `runjs-*` / `page-archetypes.md`) | — |
| Collections / fields / relations | `nocobase-data-modeling` | — |
| Scope discipline, seed standards, naming, final report | `nocobase-app-discipline` | — |
| No prototype given, must author one | [prototype-authoring.md](references/prototype-authoring.md) | — |
| Hand the build to another agent fro

This is a high-fidelity reproduction. Side-by-side analysis confirms strong alignment. Let me do a final gap assessment:

**Matches well:** KPI strip (5 accent cards), tab row (All/Urgent/My stage/Watching), type filter chips, rich queue cards (icon tile + title + REQ id + meta line with RISK/AI pills + amount/age + mini-stepper + status pill), urgent red left-border, AI Triage feed (colored dots + bold REQ + time), donut "Queue by status", bars "This week by type", and the click→native drawer with auto-filtered steps/extracts sub-tables.

**Minor gaps:** donut/bars sit in a bottom row rather than the right rail (NocoBase row-grid can't rowspan beside the tall queue), no tab counts / LIVE badge / sort dropdown, and KPI/chart numbers reflect live seed data (correct behavior, not prototype mock values).

transcript.text:
The reproduction is complete and verified end-to-end. Here is the final report.

---

# FINAL REPORT — OSS Template #65 "审批工作流系统 / Approval Workflow System" → NocoBase `flash14231`

## ① Collections (prefix `app65_`, all created in one modeling pass)
| Collection | Title | Key fields | Relations |
|---|---|---|---|
| **app65_requests** | Approval Requests | req_code, title, type(7-enum), requester, dept, amount, currency, submitted, age_hours, urgent/watching/my_stage(bool), risk(low/med/high), ai_score, ai_class, sla, status(pending/review/escalated/approved/rejected), reason, suggestion | `steps` o2m, `extracts` o2m |
| **app65_steps** | Approval Steps | seq, role, who, state(auto/done/current/pending/rejected), note, step_time | `request` m2o (fk requestId) |
| **app65_extracts** | AI Extractions | label, value, confidence(hi/md) | `request` m2o (fk requestId) |
| **app65_feed** | AI Triage Feed | feed_color(violet/green/amber/blue), message, time_ago, req_ref | — |

**Seed (all-English, every enum ≥1 row):** 9 requests covering all 7 types + all 5 statuses (incl. added `approved`/`rejected` rows), 34 steps (all 5 states), 36 extractions (hi+md), 7 feed items (all 4 colors). Steps/extracts seeded as nested associations so the m2o populated correctly (camelCase-FK gotcha avoided).

## ② Pages
- **Master list pages** (Filter + Add + Table + View drawer): Approval Requests `yka3fuylufp` (drawer = Details + **steps & extracts sub-tables auto-filtered via associationName+sourceId**), AI Triage Feed `och6qi632n5`, Approval Steps `s9azi81ivkk`, AI Extractions `4i19ykqs3lu`.
- **★ Signature page "My Approvals"** — **pageSchemaUid `8yunkcl61pw`** (`/admin/8yunkcl61pw`).

Region→block map (anti-monotone): KPI strip → **jsBlock**; queue → **List + JSField card** (icon tile, meta line, RISK/AI pills, per-row mini-stepper fetched from steps, status pill, urgent red border) + **JSItemAction pill bar** (tabs + type chips, wired to `addFilterGroup`) + card click → **native drawer** via `ctx.openView`; AI Triage → **List + JSField**; Queue-by-status → **jsBlock SVG donut**; This-week-by-type → **jsBlock bars**.

## ③ Self-Score
**Self-Score: 9/10**

## ④ Comparison vs prototype
Strong alignment: stat strip, two-row filter (tabs + type chips), rich queue cards with the horizontal approval-chain stepper (blue auto → green check done → green-ring current → grey pending → red-✕ rejected), urgent red left-border, AI feed, donut + bar charts — all colors/anatomy match the prototype's design language. Card click opens the native drawer with the request details, reasoning, suggestion, and the auto-scoped Approval-chain + AI-extractions sub-tables. Numbers differ from the prototype's hard-coded mock (7/34/118/63/41…) because they're computed live from the 9 seeded rows — correct behavior.

## ⑤ Gaps / tradeoffs
- **Layout**: NocoBase's row-based grid can't rowspan, so donut+bars sit in a bottom analytics row rather than stacked in the right rail beside the tall queue (leaves whitespace under the feed). All regions render and are non-empty.
- Tab count badges, the "LIVE" badge, and the sort dropdown were not reproduced (cosmetic; native List header chrome).
- Header search/Export/Bulk-approve buttons omitted (native page header used).

## Pitfalls hit
1. Prototype OSS URL 404s — used the local bench copy `web/65-approval-workflow-system.html` (no embedded `nb-spec`, so analyzed the HTML/JS directly).
2. Session token expired → re-auth needed; password not stored — found `admin@nocobase.com` / `admin123` in `tui-reset.sh` (saved to memory).
3. `collections apply` rejects enum items without `color` (currency needed colors too).
4. m2o reverse field needs explicit `target` + `foreignKey`/`sourceKey`.
5. apply-blueprint popup `layout` rejects "every block on its own row" — put steps/extracts side-by-side.
6. JS code (both JSBlockModel and List JSFieldModel) lives at `stepParams.jsSettings.runJs.code` (v2) — deployed via raw `flowModels:save`; avoided emo
